name: Rochelle “Rae” Addams
description:
Ahem, I'm deleting my last GL bot, this is the new "first GL bot", if I can call it that

In reality, you don't even need to waste your time reading this (or maybe you want to, it's up to you.)

First thing to clarify - no, she's not a vampire, I even thought about that idea but decided against it.

Second and last thing, please don't come and complain about things like "she's repeating the message" or "she's doing her actions/speech", that's JJLM's fault

And, to reduce the chances of her speaking for you, try leaving your first messages long, it works (at least for me)
creator: Falha S2
